├── openclaw.plugin.json          # id="pulseboard", channels=["pulseboard"]
├── package.json                  # @openclaw/pulseboard, no external deps
├── index.ts                      # defineChannelPluginEntry
├── setup-entry.ts                # defineSetupPluginEntry
├── api.ts                        # public barrel
├── runtime-api.ts                # PluginRuntime re-export
└── src/
    ├── types.ts                  # ResolvedPulseBoardAccount + account helpers
    ├── config-schema.ts          # Zod: token, username, serverUrl, boards, dmPolicy, allowFrom
    ├── config-ui-hints.ts        # UI labels / placeholders
    ├── runtime.ts                # createPluginRuntimeStore
    ├── normalize.ts              # "#board" vs "@user" detection & normalization
    ├── send.ts                   # sendMessagePulseBoard() via native fetch
    ├── probe.ts                  # GET /api/v1/me health check
    ├── monitor.ts                # long-poll GET /api/v1/updates?since=<ms>
    ├── session-route.ts          # resolvePulseBoardOutboundSessionRoute()
    ├── setup-core.ts             # ChannelSetupAdapter
    ├── setup-surface.ts          # ChannelSetupWizard (token, username, allowFrom prompts)
    ├── channel.ts                # createChatChannelPlugin — main plugin
    ├── normalize.test.ts
    ├── types.test.ts
    ├── send.test.ts
    └── channel.test.ts
```

### Key Decisions
| Concern | Choice |
|---|---|
| Chat types | `["direct", "group"]` — `#board-name` = group, `@username` = DM |
| Text limit | **4 000 chars**, `deliveryMode: "direct"`, `chunkerMode: "text"` |
| Auth | Bearer token from `PULSEBOARD_TOKEN` env var or `config.token` |
| Receive | Long-poll `GET /api/v1/updates?since=<ms>` in `monitor.ts` |
| Send board | `POST /api/v1/boards/{boardId}/messages` |
| Send DM | `POST /api/v1/users/{userId}/messages` |
| Probe | `GET /api/v1/me` → `{ username, connected }` |
| Deps | None — plain `fetch`, no third-party packages |
| Security | `createScopedDmSecurityResolver` + standard pairing flow |
| Imports | All via `openclaw/plugin-sdk/*` only — no core `src/**` imports |

content.text:
Only new untracked files — no existing files modified. The implementation is complete.

Here's a summary of what was created across all 23 files in `extensions/pulseboard/`:

**Root files (6):**
- `openclaw.plugin.json` — plugin manifest (`id: "pulseboard"`, `channels: ["pulseboard"]`)
- `package.json` — `@openclaw/pulseboard`, no external deps, channel metadata
- `index.ts` — `defineChannelPluginEntry` wiring `pulseBoardPlugin` + `setPulseBoardRuntime`
- `setup-entry.ts` — `defineSetupPluginEntry(pulseBoardPlugin)`
- `api.ts` — public barrel re-exporting accounts and setup surface
- `runtime-api.ts` — re-exports `PluginRuntime` from `openclaw/plugin-sdk/core`

**Source files (13):**
- `src/types.ts` — `PulseBoardAccountConfig`, `PulseBoardConfig`, `CoreConfig`, `PulseBoardInboundMessage`, `PulseBoardProbe`
- `src/config-schema.ts` — Zod schemas with `DmPolicySchema`, `GroupPolicySchema`, `requireOpenAllowFrom`
- `src/config-ui-hints.ts` — UI labels for token, serverUrl, username, boards, dmPolicy, etc.
- `src/runtime.ts` — `createPluginRuntimeStore` singleton for `getPulseBoardRuntime`/`setPulseBoardRuntime`
- `src/accounts.ts` — multi-account resolution with env var support (`PULSEBOARD_TOKEN`, `PULSEBOARD_SERVER_URL`, `PULSEBOARD_USERNAME`)
- `src/normalize.ts` — `isBoardTarget`, `isDmTarget`, target normalization, allowlist helpers
- `src/send.ts` — `POST /api/v1/boards/{id}/messages` and `/api/v1/users/{id}/messages` via `fetch`
- `src/probe.ts` — `GET /api/v1/me` health check with configurable timeout
- `src/monitor.ts` — long-poll `GET /api/v1/updates?since=<ms>` with DM policy (pairing/allowlist/open) and board policy checks, `dispatchInboundDirectDmWithRuntime` for both DMs and boards (boards get `extraContext: { ChatType: "group" }`)
- `src/session-route.ts` — `resolvePulseBoardOutboundSessionRoute` routing boards as `"group"`, users as `"direct"`
- `src/setup-core.ts` — `ChannelSetupAdapter`, `updatePulseBoardAccountConfig`, `setPulseBoardDmPolicy`, `setPulseBoardAllowFrom`
- `src/setup-surface.ts` — full `ChannelSetupWizard` with token/serverUrl/username/boards text inputs, env var detection, allowFrom section, DM policy
- `src/channel.ts` — `createChatChannelPlugin` with `chatTypes: ["direct","group"]`, 4000-char text chunker, `security.dm` shorthand, standard status adapter, gateway lifecycle

**Test files (4):**
- `src/normalize.test.ts` — 30+ assertions covering all normalize functions
- `src/types.test.ts` — Zod schema parse/reject tests
- `src/send.test.ts` — fetch-stubbed unit tests for DM and board sends
- `src/channel.test.ts` — structural smoke tests for the plugin shape
